assertions.assertion: Lists passkeys/WebAuthn/FIDO2 as a supported authentication method
assertions.rationale: Lists 'Passkeys — WebAuthn/FIDO2 phishing-resistant credentials' in the table.

assertions.assertion: Lists TOTP (authenticator apps) as a supported method
assertions.rationale: Lists 'TOTP — Time-based one-time passwords (RFC 6238)' with authenticator app description.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that multiple authentication methods can coexist for the same user
assertions.rationale: States 'supports multiple authentication methods that can coexist for the same user' and 'Both methods can be registered simultaneously'.

assertions.assertion: Notes that OTP (email/SMS) is the default passwordless flow
assertions.rationale: States 'OTP via email/SMS is the default passwordless flow'.
